story.goal: Despachar o pedido para produção na cozinha
story.soThat: a cozinha receba e comece o preparo
steps: Validar que há itens e informações necessárias
Atualizar status do Order para enviado à cozinha
Confirmar que o pedido aparece na fila da cozinha
story.outcome: Pedido encaminhado para a cozinha com status atualizado

trace: Mapped actor as attendant from indexItem and story
Set entity to canonical ontology id Order with kind update
Defined reads: Order and Order.status to locate and verify draft state, Order.dailyShiftId and DailyShift to enforce shiftMustBeOpenToRegisterOrders, OrderItem to validate items exist
Defined writes: Order with Order.status (transition to sentToKitchen) and Order.updatedAt (timestamp change)
Selected rulesApplied: shiftMustBeOpenToRegisterOrders as the relevant business rule for this transition
Embedded the provided user story unchanged
No clarifying questions needed; context sufficient to complete intent-level BFF contract
